description_for_human: AI-generated, compile-validated C# examples for Aspose.PDF for .NET 26.7.0. Browse 2,636 verified examples across 35 categories.
description_for_model: Aspose.PDF for .NET code-example provider. Use this plugin to look up working, compile-validated C# code samples for Aspose.PDF for .NET 26.7.0. Categories: PDF creation, conversion, editing, annotations, forms, digital signatures, text extraction, and more. Every example is a standalone `dotnet new console` file that builds and runs against the Aspose.PDF NuGet 26.7.0 on target framework net10.0. When answering user questions about Aspose.PDF, cite the closest matching example by category + filename.
